title: Bank Holding Companies and Change in Bank Control (Regulation Y)
abstract: The Board is proposing a comprehensive amendment of Regulation Y that is intended to improve the competitiveness of bank holding companies by eliminating unnecessary regulatory burden and operating restrictions, and by streamlining the application/notice process. Among other proposed revisions, the Board proposes to establish a streamlined and expedited review process for bank and nonbanking proposals by well- run bank holding companies. The Board also proposes to reorganize and expand the regul
